title: Investigate dashboard build failure resolving yaml package

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Root cause identified: dashboard code imports the npm package  in  and , but  declares  only, not . Git history shows commit 68d98d85d introduced the  import in  without a matching dependency change.  contains transitive  entries, so older installs may have worked accidentally via hoisting, but a clean/fresh install leaves no resolvable top-level  module for Next/Webpack.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Root cause identified: dashboard app code imports the npm package yaml in dashboard/components/ui/score-component.tsx and dashboard/components/report-configuration-edit.tsx, but dashboard/package.json declares js-yaml only, not yaml. Git history shows commit 68d98d85d introduced the yaml import in score-component.tsx without a matching dependency change. dashboard/package-lock.json contains yaml only as a transitive dependency, so older installs may have worked accidentally via hoisting, but a clean install leaves no resolvable top-level yaml module for Next/Webpack.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented fix by standardizing dashboard YAML usage on js-yaml (already declared dependency). Updated imports/usages in score-component, report-configuration-edit, procedures-dashboard, ScoreSidebarVersionHistory story, and yaml-parameter-injection test. Verified no remaining dashboard references to the yaml package import or require.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Standardized dashboard YAML handling to js-yaml and removed direct yaml package usage in affected components, stories, and tests. Commit cd3779b29 pushed to develop.
